stop-reason-types.guard: grep -q 'stopReason' packages/ai/agent-mcp-types/src/domain.ts && grep -q 'maxTokens' packages/ai/agent-mcp-types/src/domain.ts && grep -q 'CONTEXT_WINDOW_EXCEEDED' packages/ai/agent-mcp-types/src/errors.ts && npx nx build agent-mcp-types 2>&1 | grep -q 'Successfully ran'
stop-reason-types.notes: Source of truth for TokenUsage fields (stopReason, maxTokens, cacheReadTokens, cacheCreationTokens) AND all new error codes (CONTEXT_WINDOW_EXCEEDED, PROVIDER_TIMEOUT, PROVIDER_AUTH_ERROR, PROVIDER_RATE_LIMITED). Build agent-mcp-types before editing agent-mcp sources — downstream states depend on the compiled output.

provider-stop-reason.notes: Map finish_reason (OpenAI) and stop_reason (Anthropic) to the normalised four-value enum. LMStudioProvider extends OpenAIProvider — it inherits the change automatically. claudecli has no stop_reason — usage stays undefined.

schema-migration.guard: grep -q 'stop_reason' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/schema.ts && grep -q 'max_tokens' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/schema.ts && python3 -c "import os; sql=[f for f in os.listdir('packages/ai/agent-mcp/drizzle') if f.endswith('.sql')]; assert len(sql)>=3, f'expected >=3 migrations, got {len(sql)}'"
schema-migration.notes: Add stop_reason TEXT nullable, max_tokens INTEGER nullable, cache_read_input_tokens INTEGER nullable, and cache_creation_input_tokens INTEGER nullable columns to taskUsageTable. Run: cd packages/ai/agent-mcp && npx drizzle-kit generate. Current migrations: 0000_nifty_sasquatch.sql and 0001_task_usage.sql — new one will be 0002_*.sql.

usage-plugin-stop.notes: Accumulator gains mostSevereStopReason (starts 'unknown', updated per model response) and maxTokens (set once at task:start from provider config). onConflictDoUpdate must include stopReason but NOT maxTokens — it is a constant per task.

usage-report-stop.notes: usageSummarySchema gains stopReason?: z.string(). summarise() folds stop_reason using severity-wins logic across rows (see [inv:stop-reason-severity] in _shared.md). buildTaskUsageReport propagates it automatically via summarise().

env-var-fixes.guard: grep -q 'AGENT_MCP_MAX_DEPTH' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/index.ts && grep -q 'AGENT_MCP_MAX_TOOL_LOOPS' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/index.ts && grep -q 'AGENT_MCP_DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/index.ts
env-var-fixes.notes: index.ts currently reads bare MAX_DEPTH and MAX_TOOL_LOOPS (missing AGENT_MCP_ prefix — these are bugs). Reconcile MAX_TOOL_LOOPS default to 50 (code=10, docs=50 — mismatch). Add AGENT_MCP_DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS env var (default 8192) parsed in index.ts and injected into PolicyEngine or used by providers.

cache-tokens.notes: Anthropic SDK returns cache_read_input_tokens and cache_creation_input_tokens on usage. These are currently ignored. Add cacheReadTokens?/cacheCreationTokens? to TokenUsage; forward from anthropic.ts; add nullable integer columns to schema and generate a migration (or extend the existing 0002 migration if schema-migration state is amended to include them).

provider-error-codes.notes: Add PROVIDER_TIMEOUT, PROVIDER_AUTH_ERROR, PROVIDER_RATE_LIMITED to both AgentMcpErrorCode (agent-mcp-types) and errorCodeSchema (agent-mcp). Fix orchestrator: throw PROVIDER_TIMEOUT on timeout (not PROVIDER_ERROR). Add 429/rate-limit detection after retry exhaustion. Add 401 auth detection in providers.

context-error-code.notes: Two changes: (1) add CONTEXT_WINDOW_EXCEEDED to errorCodeSchema z.enum in validation/errors.ts. (2) In orchestrator.ts catch block, detect context-length errors and re-throw as CONTEXT_WINDOW_EXCEEDED — MUST come before the generic PROVIDER_ERROR re-throw. OpenAI uses err.code or err.message; Anthropic uses err.message.

sliding-window.notes: Add exported windowMessages(messages, tokenLimit) pure function to session-store.ts (no DB access). In orchestrator run(), parse AGENT_MCP_CONTEXT_LIMIT at the top (0 = disabled). Before each provider.chat() call, if limit > 0: pass windowMessages(currentMessages, limit) instead of currentMessages. Never mutate currentMessages itself.

claudecli-auth-fix.notes: Fix: buildSubprocessEnv catch {} silently swallows keychain errors. Fix: AnthropicProvider with useClaudeOauth must degrade gracefully to env vars. Fix: recovery instruction must appear in PROVIDER_AUTH_ERROR message. See [inv:claudecli-auth-recovery] and [def:ProviderAuthError] in _shared.md.

robustness-fixes.notes: Two fixes in orchestrator.ts: (1) Empty tool-call guard — when stopReason is 'tool_calls' but toolCalls array is empty, break the loop instead of spinning. (2) Cancellation detection — replace error.message string-matching ('cancelled') with error code comparison (error.code === 'PROVIDER_ERROR' check is insufficient; use TASK_CANCELLED or check signal.aborted).

audit-foundation.notes: The audit script covers all foundation + correctness checks. Run it; fix failures in source files (never weaken the script). Most likely failure: stop-reason-types.2 (maxTokens disambiguation), cache-tokens checks, env-var-fixes checks.

code-review.notes: Human hold point. The executor must pause here and wait for the reviewer to inspect the diff and create the sentinel file. See contexts/code-review.md for the review checklist.

audit-final.notes: Runs all checks including the test suite (npx nx test agent-mcp) and build verification. Most likely failures: test expectations not updated for new optional fields, or PROVIDER_TIMEOUT/PROVIDER_AUTH_ERROR detection not matching the correct error class/property from the provider SDK.

docs-and-publish.notes: Follow PUBLISHING.md exactly. Bump agent-mcp-types first (0.0.2 → 0.0.6), then agent-mcp (0.0.5 → 0.0.6). Add all new env vars and error codes to CLAUDE.md and README. Mark Gaps #6 and #7 resolved in GAPS.md.
